heading: Buildings on reservations, parks, or public grounds
label: 8106 Buildings on reservations, parks, or public grounds
text: A building or structure shall not be erected on any reservation, park, or public grounds of the Federal Government in the District of Columbia without express authority of Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)810640:68.(10th par. on p. 444), .Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 355, § 137 Stat. 444The words “On and after ” are omitted as obsolete.August 24, 1912
